name: The Country Club at Woodloch Springs
about: The Country Club at Woodloch Springs is an 18-hole, par-72 championship golf course located within a full-service resort in the Pocono Mountains. It features a renowned 16-acre practice facility and a state-of-the-art indoor performance studio equipped with GCQuad and FullSwing launch monitors for lessons and club fittings. The venue operates as a semi-private, resort-based golf experience that emphasizes hospitality and service, complemented by a 4.5-star Golf Digest rating. While the outdoor course is seasonal, the indoor simulator provides year-round access for practice and play.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium GCQuad and FullSwing launch monitors for detailed swing and ball data
16-acre practice facility with a championship course for comprehensive skill development
Resort setting with full hospitality services, including a golf grille and social events
Signature 14th hole offers a dramatic 220-yard carry over Hells Gate Gorge

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service food & beverage available at the golf grille and resort restaurants
Cocktails and drinks available at the golf grille and resort bars

simulator_hardware.notes: Latest addition for swing and ball tracking, providing accurate data for lessons and fittings
Radar-based launch monitor for club distance comparison and driver analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but club rentals and certified club fittings are available on-site using advanced launch monitor technology.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned, but the venue offers a full-service golf grille and resort dining options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The 18-hole championship course plays 6,579 yards with varying challenges; typical round time depends on pace of play and tee time availability.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, as a family resort, the venue offers junior golf programs and family-friendly amenities and events.
